front: How do antibody-drug conjugates achieve targeted delivery?
back: ADCs: monoclonal antibody + linker + cytotoxic payload. Antibody provides tumor selectivity. Linkers: cleavable (protease-sensitive, pH-sensitive) or non-cleavable. Payloads: maytansinoids, auristatins, calicheamicins. DAR (drug-to-antibody ratio) affects PK.
